title: Server Cosmetics
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-label?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&labelColor=%237289da&color=%237289da&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FrgT62cvHNQ)](https://discord.gg/4nZYz3a4KE)

A mod that adds server side cosmetics such as hats and item skins.

## Commands:
`/cm` - open hat cosmetics GUI

`/cm reload` - hat cosmetics configs

`/is` - open itemskins GUI

`/is reload` - item skins configs

`/sc reload` - reload all configs

You can find all permissions in the configs.

## Requirements:
- To see armor skins you need Optifine or CIT Resewn (hats will work with or without it)

## Currently implemented:
- Hats
- Item Skins

In meanwhile fully vanilla armor skins (wthout Optifine/CIT) well be implemented

Having problems? Or you want to help with development? Ask a question in our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/4nZYz3a4KE)!

### You can find more information on the [**wiki**](https://stikulzon.github.io/server-cosmetics-docs/pages/Getting%20Started.html)!
